steps.title: Find the cropland contribution
steps.content:
Cropland is $56.0\%$ of the property, and buildings are on $22.5\%$ of the cropland:
$$
0.560(22.5)=12.6
$$
So cropland contributes $12.6\%$ of the whole property with buildings.

steps.title: Find the meadow contribution
steps.content:
The meadow covers $100\%-56.0\%=44.0\%$ of the property. Its building share of the whole property is
$$
0.440(12.5)=5.5
$$

steps.title: Add the contributions
steps.content: Add the two whole-property percentages: $$ p=12.6+5.5=18.1 $$ The answer is 18.1.
